description.zh-CN: 将 FastWhisperSubtitle 后端裁剪为 Lator Python runtime 插件，接收音视频路径并返回结构化字幕片段。
description.en-US: Packages the FastWhisperSubtitle backend as a Lator Python runtime plugin that transcribes media files into structured subtitle segments.

description.zh-CN: 比 base 更准确，下载后可在识别弹窗中为本次音视频选择 small。
description.en-US: More accurate than base. Download it, then select small in the recognition dialog for a media file.

description.zh-CN: 准确率和体积居中，下载后可在识别弹窗中为本次音视频选择 medium。
description.en-US: A middle ground for accuracy and size. Download it, then select medium in the recognition dialog for a media file.

description.zh-CN: 更高准确率的大模型，下载后可在识别弹窗中为本次音视频选择 large-v3。
description.en-US: A higher-accuracy large model. Download it, then select large-v3 in the recognition dialog for a media file.

description.zh-CN: large-v3 turbo 的 CTranslate2 转换模型，下载后可在识别弹窗中为本次音视频选择 turbo。
description.en-US: CTranslate2 conversion of large-v3 turbo. Download it, then select turbo in the recognition dialog for a media file.

description.zh-CN: Silero 安装更简单；pyannote 准确率更高，但需要 Hugging Face 账号、接受模型条款并提供 token。
description.en-US: Silero is easier to install. pyannote is more accurate, but requires a Hugging Face account, model-term acceptance, and a token.

label.zh-CN: 授权下载 pyannote VAD 模型

description.zh-CN: pyannote/segmentation-3.0 可能需要先登录 Hugging Face 并同意模型条款。
description.en-US: pyannote/segmentation-3.0 may require signing in to Hugging Face and accepting the model terms first.

description.zh-CN: base 随插件默认安装；small、medium、large-v3、turbo 可在设置页按需下载后为本次音视频选择。
description.en-US: base is installed by default; small, medium, large-v3, and turbo can be downloaded on demand in settings, then selected for this media file.

description.zh-CN: 选择一种语言会跳过片段语言检测，并强制所有片段按该语言识别；选择自动检测时会按片段检测语言。
description.en-US: Choose one language to skip segment language detection and force all segments to use it. Auto detect uses per-segment language detection.

description.zh-CN: 多语言影片中只处理并保留选中的语言；不选择则保留全部语言。仅在识别语言为自动检测时生效。
description.en-US: For multilingual media, only process and keep selected languages. Leave empty to keep all languages. Applies only when recognition language is Auto detect.

description.zh-CN: 两段语音之间静音超过这个时长时，才拆成不同字幕片段。数值越大越容易合并，越小越容易切碎。
description.en-US: Split into separate subtitle cues only when the silence between speech spans exceeds this duration. Higher values merge more; lower values split more.

description.zh-CN: 已知幻觉短语会始终过滤。开启后还会用 <del> 标记低置信度字幕。默认关闭，适合测试后再使用。
description.en-US: Known hallucination phrases are always filtered. When enabled, low-confidence subtitles are also marked with <del>. Off by default; use after testing.
